Short CV

Dr. Uğur Çini received B.S. degree from Yıldız Technical University in electronics and communications engineering, M.S. and PhD degrees from Boğaziçi University, both in electrical and electronics engineering. From 2001 to 2006, he worked as a research assistant at Boğaziçi University and Southern Methodist University, TX, USA. Later, he worked as an R&D engineer at İsbak Inc. and developed projects related to the traffic infrastructure of Istanbul Municipality. He also worked as a digital design and verification engineer at Anka Mikroelektronik Inc. He has been serving as a faculty member at Üsküdar University since 2019. His research interests include CMOS circuit design, biomedical instrumentation, digital arithmetic, and design with FPGAs.
